title: junellia digitata
intro: Junellia digitata, also known as the "Tolomate" or "Palo de Fierro," is a shrub-like plant native to the Andean region of South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Junellia digitata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for a range of health benefits.
